basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 20 Posts

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 45 years as on the date of interview. Relaxation for SC, ST and OBC as per rules.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years as on the date of interview. Age Relaxation: SC, ST and OBC candidates will be given age relaxation as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/Diploma or MBBS degree. Preference to PG Degree or Diploma qualified candidates.
qualification.details: Senior Resident: PG Degree/Diploma or MBBS degree from recognized university At least two years of working experience Out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic)

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level -11 (Rs. 67,700/-) plus other allowances as per ESIC Rules.
salary_details.details: Pay Level -11 (Rs. 67,700/-) plus other allowances as per ESIC Rules. Total Emoluments (approx.): Rs. 1,49,284/- (Basic Pay Rs. 67,700/- + NPA Rs. 13,540/- + DA Rs. 48,744/- + HRA Rs. 13,540/- + TA & DA Rs. 5760/-)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at ESIC Hospital, Adityapur, Jharkhand is scheduled for 06th July 2026. Subsequent interviews will be held on the first Wednesday of every month.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG Degree/Diploma or MBBS degree from a recognized university with at least two years of working experience, including one year in the concerned specialty from a government or private hospital.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years as of the interview date. Age relaxation is applicable for SC, ST, and OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The salary is as per Pay Level -11 (Rs. 67,700/-) plus other allowances as per ESIC Rules, with total emoluments approximately Rs. 1,49,284/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies for Senior Resident posts across various specializations.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 400/- for General, EWS, and OBC candidates, Rs. 100/- for SC/ST candidates, and exempted for female candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ESIC Hospital, Adityapur, Jharkhand, Pin Code: 831013.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring two sets of self-attested copies of required documents, original documents for verification, and a No Objection Certificate if currently employed.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any preference given during the selection process?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have completed their PG Degree or Diploma.
